query:
INSERT INTO custom_field_values (field_id, model_id, value, updated_by)
                 VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
                 ON CONFLICT (field_id, model_id) WHERE model_id IS NOT NULL
                 DO UPDATE SET value = EXCLUDED.value, updated_by = EXCLUDED.updated_by,
                               updated_at = now()
                 RETURNING id
